name: Baked Fudge Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the first five ingredients together. Add the chopped nuts.
2. Make a well in the center and add milk, vanilla, and melted shortening.
3. Stir lightly and pour the batter into a greased casserole dish.
SAUCE:
4. Measure cocoa, brown sugar, hot water, and grated orange rind into a bowl and beat well.
5. Pour the sauce over the batter.
6. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes at 350°F. As this dessert bakes, the batter rises through the rich chocolate sauce.
7. Serve hot with whipped cream or vanilla ice cream.
